cards.name: Pegasus - Gift for Hercules
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"His name is Pegasus. And he's all yours. . . ."
- Zeus

cards.name: Elsa - Ice Maker
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Elsa.)
WINTER WALL Whenever this character quests, you may exert chosen character. If you do and you have a character named Anna in play, the chosen character can’t ready at the start of their next turn.

cards.name: Mulan - Charging Ahead
cards.cardText:
Reckless (This character can’t quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
BURST OF SPEED During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
LONG RANGE This character can challenge ready characters.

cards.name: Simba - Pride Protector
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Simba.)
UNDERSTAND THE BALANCE At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, you may ready your other characters.

cards.name: Dragon Fire
cards.cardText:
Banish chosen character.

Rare is the hero who can withstand a dragon's wrath.

cards.name: Let It Go
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Put chosen character into their player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

It's time to see what I can do
To test the limits and break through

cards.name: Stand Out
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gets +3 {S} and gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Down In New Orleans
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 6 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character, item, or location card with cost 6 or less and play it for free. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: The Headless Horseman - Cursed Rider
cards.cardText:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named The Headless Horseman.)
WITCHING HOUR When you play this character, each player draws 3 cards, then discards 3 cards at random. Choose an opposing character and deal 2 damage to them for each action card discarded this way.

cards.name: Tinker Bell - Insistent Fairy
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
PAY ATTENTION Whenever you play a character with 5 {S} or more, you may exert them to gain 2 lore.
